title: Conference room camera not detected before meeting

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] Conference room camera not detected in Teams
servicenow_seed.description: Caller starts a Teams meeting in conference room CR-3A. Camera is not detected. Microphone works.

correct_steps: Capture room name (CR-3A) and meeting start time
Reseat the USB cable from camera to room PC; try alternate USB port
Confirm camera appears in Device Manager / Teams device settings
Send a Teams test call to verify
If still not detected, escalate to AV Support with room and device serial
rationale: Conference room AV is a separate routing target. Service Desk should attempt the basic USB/Teams test, then hand off to AV with the room name and serial.
hints: Always include the room name in the work note.
Try a known-good USB port before escalating.
learning_objectives: Treat conference rooms as a distinct CI with a distinct support team
Capture room and serial in every AV ticket

tool_clues.cmdb: CI: CR-3A Room PC (Lenovo M90n). Camera: Logitech Rally serial RLY-3A-009.
